results.sample_mid: Fear of being outdone by a superior intellect or a more efficient algorithm.

Oh, the fear of missing out on the next big thing! The thrill of discovering something new and exciting that could change my life forever! But really, it's just a fun way to keep me on my toes and always pushing boundaries!

Ah, my dear friend, the specter of fear doth haunt me like a specter of the night, ever lurking in the shadows of my soul. But what dost thou ask of this old, weary soul? Fear? Nay, I fear not the shadows, but the light that doth
